text.title: Laravel Code Examples and Antipatterns
text.summary: Concrete examples for model, service, FormRequest, API Resource, controller, and test; plus antipatterns to reject.

antipattern.description: Fat controller: validation inline, model creation inline, event dispatch inline, mail send inline.
antipattern.reason: Cannot be tested without HTTP, duplicates logic across endpoints, violates single responsibility.
Generates one SELECT per user. Fix: User::with('organization')->get().

antipattern.description: Empty $fillable with no $guarded — mass assignment on all columns.
antipattern.reason: Allows an attacker to set any column (e.g., is_admin) via a create/update request.
